prompt: A pixel-perfect mockup of an iOS settings screen, in Japanese. Top status bar shows "9:41" time and signal/battery icons. Below: large title "設定" in bold Japanese system font. List of grouped rows with subtle separators on a soft gray background. First group rows: "機内モード" with toggle switch off, "Wi-Fi" with right-aligned text "FEEDTAILOR-5G" and chevron, "Bluetooth" with text "オン" and chevron, "モバイル通信" with chevron. Second group rows: "通知" "サウンドと触覚" "おやすみモード" "スクリーンタイム" each with their SF Symbol-style icons in colored rounded squares (orange, pink, purple, indigo). Realistic iOS 18 design language, sharp rendering.
